name: odm-transformation-advisor
description: The ODM Transformation Advisor (OTA) scans your ODM projects for the use of deprecated features, or features that are incompatible with the ODMoC SaaS or containerized ODM platform. The OTA can also be used to validate that your projects are following a set of (configurable and extensible) rule project implementation best practices. It can be integrated in your DevOps toolchain to perform Continuous Code Quality Inspection (CCQI) of your rule projects.
